item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Anti-Poverty Program Coordination
item.description:
👀 Anti-Poverty Coordination

Federal anti-poverty program coordination 119th Congress: cross-agency data-sharing for eligible families · unified application portal · benefit-cliff prevention. Composes with Benefit Cliff Smoothing + EITC Expansion + Child Tax Credit Expansion + SNAP Modernization. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
